summary: Medium-priority skill routing hardening: --full-report mode for gate runner, fixture schema validation in evaluator, expanded DEFAULT_TASKS covering browser/git/code-review/meta domains, learning update for governance compliance

changes: --full-report flag in run-skill-routing-gates.mjs runs all gates without fail-fast, aggregates failures
validateFixture() + loadAndValidateFixture() in evaluator with actionable error messages
Expanded DEFAULT_TASKS from 8 to 13: added browser-1, git-1, review-request-1, review-receive-1, meta-skill-1
GATES exported from gate runner with isMain guard for testability
21 new tests covering fixture validation, task coverage, gate array, full-report mode
